title: Dropdown Menu Component
content:
This component provides a customizable dropdown menu, built upon Radix UI's DropdownMenu primitive. It offers a flexible and accessible way to present secondary actions or information.

## Key Exports

*   `DropdownMenu`: The root component for the dropdown menu.
*   `DropdownMenuTrigger`: The element that triggers the dropdown menu to open.
*   `DropdownMenuPortal`: Renders children into a React portal. Use this to ensure menus appear above other elements.
*   `DropdownMenuGroup`: Used to group menu items.
*   `DropdownMenuSub`: Used for nested sub-menus.
*   `DropdownMenuRadioGroup`: Used for radio button selection within a dropdown.
*   `DropdownMenuSubTrigger`: Trigger for a sub-menu.
*   `DropdownMenuSubContent`: The content container for a sub-menu.
*   `DropdownMenuContent`: The container for dropdown menu items. Accepts `sideOffset` to control positioning.
*   `DropdownMenuItem`: A single item within the dropdown menu. Accepts an `inset` prop for indentation.
*   `DropdownMenuCheckboxItem`: A checkbox item within the dropdown menu. Displays a checkmark when selected.
*   `DropdownMenuRadioItem`: A radio item within the dropdown menu. Displays a circle when selected.
*   `DropdownMenuLabel`: A label for a group of menu items. Accepts an `inset` prop for indentation.
*   `DropdownMenuSeparator`: A horizontal line to visually separate menu items.
*   `DropdownMenuShortcut`: Displays keyboard shortcuts associated with menu items.

## Usage Example

```tsx
import {
  DropdownMenu,
  DropdownMenuTrigger,
  DropdownMenuContent,
  DropdownMenuItem,
  DropdownMenuSeparator,
  DropdownMenuLabel,
  DropdownMenuShortcut,
} from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu";

function MyDropdown() {
  return (
    <DropdownMenu>
      <DropdownMenuTrigger asChild>
        <Button variant="outline">Open Menu</Button>
      </DropdownMenuTrigger>
      <DropdownMenuContent className="w-56">
        <DropdownMenuLabel>My Account</DropdownMenuLabel>
        <DropdownMenuSeparator />
        <DropdownMenuItem inset>
          Profile
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>⇧⌘P</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
        <DropdownMenuItem inset disabled>
          Log Out
          <DropdownMenuShortcut>⇧⌘Q</DropdownMenuShortcut>
        </DropdownMenuItem>
      </DropdownMenuContent>
    </DropdownMenu>
  );
}
```

This example demonstrates a basic dropdown menu with a trigger, content, a label, a separator, and two menu items, one of which is disabled. It also includes keyboard shortcuts.
